title: Reimagined Tool Breaking
description: Addon for Reimagined. Changes the appearance of tools the more they are damaged!
body:
# WIP - WORK IN PROGRESS
**This pack is in really early stages, this means not everything is complete and is actively developed**

# About
This is an addon pack for [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) resource pack made by [Reijvi](https://modrinth.com/user/Reijvi).

When your tools reach 20%, 10% and 5% durability they will change their texture to appear worn down respectively to the stage. The closer the tool is to breaking the more broken it will appear.

All textures are made by me (Rafii2198) and are based on original textures by Reijvi.

# Links
Follow the progress with possibilities of sneak peaks at my Bluesky account [here](https://bsky.app/profile/rafii2198.bsky.social)

Check out the Reimagined Resource Pack [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined)
